title: B01 Chilled Water Outlet Temperature Setpoint
summary: Default chilled water outlet temperature setpoint is 7.0°C, adjustable from -26.0°C to 30.0°C in 0.1°C increments.
evidence_quote: B01 板式换热器出口温度 可设范围 -26.0℃到30.0℃,间隔 0.1℃，内设值为7.0℃。

title: B02 Hot Water Outlet Temperature Setpoint
summary: Default hot water outlet temperature setpoint is 45.0°C, adjustable from 20.0°C to 60.0°C in 0.1°C increments.
evidence_quote: B02 热水出口温度 可设范围20.0℃到60.0℃，间隔 0.1℃，内设值为45.0℃。

title: B06 Operating Mode
summary: Operating mode can be set to Cooling, Heating, or Extern (external control). Default is Cooling.
evidence_quote: B06 运转模式 制冷: Cooling ，制热: Heating 外部连接控制: Extern 内设值: Cooling

title: B07 Control Mode
summary: Control mode can be set to Remote or Local. Default is Local.
evidence_quote: B07 控制模式 遥控: Remote ，手动: Local 内设值: Local

title: D10 Evaporator Pump Off Delay Time
summary: Evaporator pump off delay time adjustable from 1 to 10 minutes in 1-minute steps, default 1 minute.
evidence_quote: D10 蒸发器水泵断电延时时间 可设范围从1分钟到10分钟，间隔 1分钟，内设值为1分钟。

title: D12 Compressor Start Sequence
summary: Compressor start sequence options: 1~2, 2~1, Auto (balanced by run time), TRANE (alternate each start). Default is TRANE.
evidence_quote: D12 压缩机启动顺序 先 1 机后 2 机 1 ～2 先 2 机后 1 机 2 ～1 由运转时间平衡 Au to 每次启动互换 T RANE 内设值 T RANE

title: A EVP water flow
summary: Evaporator water flow loss for more than 2 seconds. Orange light flashes if compressor running, otherwise off.
evidence_quote: A EVP water flow 蒸发器缺水超过2秒, 若压缩机仍在运转则橙色灯会闪烁, 若压缩机未运转则橙色灯不亮

title: M Low ref.ckt1
summary: Circuit 1 evaporator refrigerant saturated temperature below low refrigerant setpoint.

structured_payload.meaning: 蒸发器冷媒饱和温度低于冷媒低温设定(回路1)
structured_payload.action: 检查膨胀阀和冷媒负荷

evidence_quote: M Low ref.ckt1 蒸发器冷媒饱和温度低于冷媒低温设定(回路1)

title: M Low water ckt1
summary: Circuit 1 evaporator leaving water temperature below minimum setpoint.

structured_payload.meaning: 蒸发器出水温度低于最小出水温度设定(回路1)

evidence_quote: M Low water ckt1 蒸发器出水温度低于最小出水温度设定(回路1)

title: M Pressure ckt1
summary: Circuit 1 high pressure trips too frequently, causing shutdown.

structured_payload.meaning: 回路1高压跳脱太过频繁, 造成停机

evidence_quote: M Pressure ckt1 回路1高压跳脱太过频繁, 造成停机

title: M Comp. A1 fault
summary: Compressor A1 current overload.

structured_payload.action: 复位压缩机A1过载继电器

evidence_quote: M Comp. A1 fault A1 压缩机电流过载

title: A Sensor 1 main
summary: Main panel temperature probe 1 (evaporator leaving water) out of range (short < -40°C, open > 80°C).

structured_payload.meaning: 主面板温度探头1(蒸发器出水温度)超出范围

evidence_quote: A Sensor 1 main 主面板(A1)的温度探头1(蒸发器出水温度)超出范围 (闭路<-40oC, 开路>80oC)

title: Normal Superheat Range
summary: Normal superheat is 6°C to 8°C. Low superheat may cause liquid slugging.
evidence_quote: 正常的过热度为6℃～8℃，过量的冷媒进入板式热交换器会造成吸气压力过高及过热度降低，可能出现液击。

title: Normal Subcooling Range
summary: Normal subcooling is 8°C to 10°C under normal operation.
evidence_quote: 如果系统在正常状态下工作，冷媒的正常过冷度应为8℃～10℃。

title: Plate Heat Exchanger Chemical Cleaning
summary: Use hot phosphoric acid at 50-60°C, 15% concentration, circulate for 3-6 hours.

structured_payload.procedure: Chemical cleaning of plate heat exchanger

evidence_quote: 清洗剂应选用热磷酸液,其使用条件为:50～60℃,浓度15%,循环清洗3～6小时。

title: Water Filter Requirement
summary: All units must install a filter capable of filtering particles larger than 1 mm to prevent evaporator fouling.
evidence_quote: 所有机组都必须安装过滤器，且必须能过滤直径大于1毫米的颗粒，以确保杂质不能进入蒸发器。

title: Pump Installation Location
summary: Circulating water pump must be installed on the evaporator inlet pipe to ensure positive pressure inside the evaporator.
evidence_quote: 循环水泵必须装在蒸发器的进水管上以保证蒸发器内部为正压。

title: Winter Startup Preheating
summary: In winter, preheat the unit for 20-30 minutes before starting indoor units.
evidence_quote: 冬季开机时，请先将机组预热20～30分钟，然后再运行室内机组。

title: Power Supply Voltage Deviation Limit
summary: Maximum voltage deviation of power supply must not exceed 10%.
evidence_quote: 电源电压的最大偏差不能超过10%。

title: Motor Insulation Resistance Minimum
summary: Do not start if motor insulation resistance is less than 2 megohms.
evidence_quote: 如果马达的绝缘电阻小于2兆欧姆，则不能启动。

title: Voltage Unbalance Maximum
summary: Maximum voltage unbalance must not exceed 2%.
evidence_quote: 电压不平衡度最大不可超过2%。

title: Circuit Breaker Sizing
summary: User must install a circuit breaker with rated current not less than 150% of unit rated current.
evidence_quote: 用户必须自行为机组安装断路器,其额定电流不可小于机组额定电流的150%

title: CXAH040 Water Pressure Loss at 491 LPM
summary: At 491 LPM flow and 3°C ΔT, water pressure loss is 78 kPa for CXAH040.

title: CXAH120 Water Pressure Loss at 1007 LPM
summary: At 1007 LPM flow and 3°C ΔT, water pressure loss is 70 kPa for CXAH120.

title: Compressor Rotation Check
summary: If refrigerant pressure does not rise within 30 seconds of compressor start, immediately shut down and check rotation direction.
evidence_quote: 在压缩机启动30秒后，若冷媒压力没有上升，请立即关机并检查压缩机旋转方向。

title: Annual Maintenance Tasks
summary: Annual maintenance includes checking water circuit valves, cleaning filters, analyzing water quality, and inspecting contactors and control settings.

structured_payload.tasks: Check water valves, clean filters, analyze water, inspect contactors and controls

evidence_quote: 年度保养：1. 检查水回路上的阀门与管路，若有需要请清洗水过滤器，分析水质。

title: Freeze Protection in Winter Shutdown
summary: In freezing weather, keep pump running and do not cut power; unit will auto-start freeze protection. Alternatively, drain water if unused for long periods.

structured_payload.action: Keep pump running, maintain power, or drain water

evidence_quote: 在冬季易结冰天气，在关机状态时，为了防止结冰损坏板式换热器，请务必让水泵继续运行，不要切断电源，机组自动启动来进行防冻保护；

title: Remote Control Wiring
summary: For remote control, set B06 to Extern, B07 to Remote, remove jumper between terminals 1 and 7, and connect remote switch. Terminals 1-7 control start/stop, 1-54 control heat/cool.

structured_payload.wiring: Remove jumper 1-7, connect remote switch to 1-7 (start/stop) and 1-54 (heat/cool)

evidence_quote: 须将机组参数“B06”设定为“External”,“B07”设定为“Remote”，将机组端子台上端子1和7之间的短接片取掉，并将控制盒上的相应端子与室内的遥控开关或温控器相连。

title: A Operator stop
summary: System stopped because operator pressed the 0 key.

structured_payload.meaning: 操作者按下0键导致停机
structured_payload.action: 信息显示, 不需任何动作

evidence_quote: A Operator stop 系统停机, 由于操作者按下0键

title: A Ckt1 HP limit
summary: Circuit 1 condenser refrigerant pressure too high, system reduces number of running compressors until stop.

structured_payload.meaning: 回路1冷凝器内冷媒压力过高, 系统减少运转的压缩机数目, 直到停机为止
structured_payload.action: 检查冷凝器及风扇是否清洁

evidence_quote: A Ckt1 HP limit 回路1中冷凝器内冷媒压力过高, 系统减少运转的压缩机数目, 直到停机为止

title: A Low ambience
summary: Outdoor air temperature below setpoint.

structured_payload.meaning: 室外空气温度低于设定值
structured_payload.action: 信息显示, 不需任何动作

evidence_quote: A Low ambience 室外空气温度低于设定值

title: M Discharge ckt1
summary: A compressor in circuit 1 operated at high discharge temperature for too long, causing shutdown.

structured_payload.meaning: 回路1中一个压缩机在高排气温度运转过久, 造成停机

evidence_quote: M Discharge ckt1 回路1中一个压缩机在高排气温度运转过久, 造成停机

title: M ckt1 fault
summary: Compressors A1 and B1 simultaneously tripped on high pressure.

structured_payload.meaning: 压缩机A1和B1同时高压跳脱

evidence_quote: M ckt1 fault 压缩机A1和B1同时高压跳脱

title: M Unit fault
summary: All compressors tripped simultaneously.
evidence_quote: M Unit fault 所有压缩机同时跳脱

title: D01 Cooling Setpoint Reset Type
summary: Cooling setpoint reset type: None, Air (ambient temperature), Ret. Wat. (return water temperature). Default None.
evidence_quote: D01 制冷设定点重设形式 无: None ，由气温重设: Air 由回水温度重设: Ret . Wat. 内设值: None

title: D02 Cooling Reset Start Temperature
summary: Cooling reset start temperature adjustable from 2°C to 55°C in 0.1°C steps, default 20.0°C.
evidence_quote: D02 制冷重设启动温度 可设范围2℃～55℃，间隔0.1℃ 内设值: 20.0℃

title: D03 Cooling Reset Temperature Range
summary: Cooling reset temperature range adjustable from 2°C to 20°C in 0.1°C steps, default 10.0°C.
evidence_quote: D03 制冷重设温度范围 可设范围2℃～20℃，间隔0.1℃ 内设值: 10.0℃

title: D04 Cooling Water Temperature Difference
summary: Cooling leaving water temperature difference adjustable from -15°C to 15°C in 0.1°C steps, default -5.0°C.
evidence_quote: D04 制冷出水温差 可设范围-15℃～15℃,间隔0.1℃, 内设值: -5.0℃

title: D09 Analog Input Type
summary: Analog input type: 0-10V, 2-10V, 0-20mA, 4-20mA. Default 0-10V. 10V or 20mA corresponds to 20°C reset.
evidence_quote: D09 模拟输入形式 0～10伏 0 ..10V 2～10伏 2 ..10V 0～20毫安 0 ..20mA 4～20毫安 4 ..20mA 内设值 0 ..10V 10V或20mA代表冷水温度设定值重设为20℃。

title: D11 Evaporator Pump Auto Flush
summary: Evaporator pump auto flush interval: None, 6H, 12H, 24H, 48H. Default None.
evidence_quote: D11 蒸发器水泵自动清洗 无 N one 6小时 6 H 12小时 1 2H 24小时 2 4H 48小时 4 8H 内设值 N one
